name: Elicia Temple
subtitle: the listener in the booth

ultimate_ability.label: The Long Quiet
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game, stop the room. The next visitor speaks for as long as it takes — patience does not tick for one full turn. Elicia waits the way only she can wait.

notes: Elicia's hand is the listener loop — RECORD / TRANSCRIBE / REWIND / PLAY BACK as starters instead of the Fool's waiter-loop or the Magician's maker-loop. Buyable pool is TAPES (recorded fragments that can be replayed for delayed effects). Second stat is DOUBT (same shape as Frasier's, different lore: she doubts the truth of what she's hearing rather than her own making). Insight replaces Inspiration — currency for transcribing the long sentences. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET_SCENARIOS.md.
